languages.text: "Да будет так. Но рассчитывать в первую очередь стоит лишь на себя".
"So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."
languages.original_text: "Да будет так. Но рассчитывать в первую очередь стоит лишь на себя".

traits.locale_text: "So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."
"So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."
"So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."

languages.text: «Que así sea, pero uno siempre debe confiar en sí mismo ante todo».
languages.original_text: "So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."

traits.locale_text: «Que así sea, pero uno siempre debe confiar en sí mismo ante todo».

languages.text: “但愿如此。但归根结底，人首先还是得靠自己。”
languages.original_text: "So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."

traits.locale_text: “但愿如此。但归根结底，人首先还是得靠自己。”

languages.text: « Puisse-t-il en être ainsi, mais quelle que soient les circonstances, on doit toujours compter avant tout sur soi-même. »
languages.original_text: "So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."

traits.locale_text: « Puisse-t-il en être ainsi, mais quelle que soient les circonstances, on doit toujours compter avant tout sur soi-même. »

languages.text: "Öyle olsun. Ancak insan her zaman her şeyden önce kendisine güvenmelidir."
languages.original_text: "So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."

traits.locale_text: "Öyle olsun. Ancak insan her zaman her şeyden önce kendisine güvenmelidir."

languages.text: "Das mag sein. Aber man sollte sich in erster Linie immer auf sich selbst verlassen."
languages.original_text: "So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."

traits.locale_text: "Das mag sein. Aber man sollte sich in erster Linie immer auf sich selbst verlassen."

languages.text: 「そうであれ。しかし、第一に、人は常に自分自身に頼るべきだ。」
languages.original_text: "So may it be. But one should always rely on oneself, first and foremost."

traits.locale_text: 「そうであれ。しかし、第一に、人は常に自分自身に頼るべきだ。」
